description: Removes shapes/components or restores original styles and transforms. Can clear annotations (spotlight, surround, overbrace, underbrace, mcancel, callout), graphers (g2d, g3d), text components (print, write, label), SVG shapes (point, line, circle, vector, polygon, arc, angle), and collections (seq, para). Also restores original styles from stroke/fill/stroke-width configs and reverses canvas pan transformations.
utility: Remove shapes or restore original styling and transforms

arguments.name: targets
arguments.description: One or more variable references to shapes to clear, or config references (from stroke(), fill(), pan()) to restore original state

alternates.description: Animate canvas back to original position

examples.expression:
A = point(G, 0, 0)
B = circle(G, 2, 1, 1)
clear(A, B)
